capabilities: Integrate custom oracles and sanitizers to detect security vulnerabilities beyond simple crashes during fuzz testing.

procedure.action: Compose AddressSanitizer and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer into the fuzzing process to detect memory corruption and undefined behavior; log sanitizer findings to security_log by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Design custom oracles to detect privilege escalation by monitoring system calls and comparing against a whitelist of allowed operations; log violations to escalation_log using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Invoke timing analysis by measuring execution time variance using high-resolution timers; flag operations with variance >5% as potential timing leaks and log to timing_log.

Invoke state consistency checks by capturing pre- and post-operation state snapshots; compare snapshots using hash comparison and log discrepancies to state_log by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.
Run fuzz tests with a diverse set of inputs generated by a grammar-based fuzzer; ensure input coverage >80% by analyzing code coverage reports.

summary: Fuzz testing for security requires oracles that detect issues beyond crashes, such as privilege escalation, timing leaks, and state inconsistencies.
title: Security-Oriented Fuzz Testing

failureConditions: Security vulnerabilities remain undetected when oracles only check for crashes, causing potential exploits to go unnoticed.
Privilege escalation vulnerabilities are missed when system call monitoring is not implemented, allowing unauthorized access.
Timing leaks are not identified when execution time variance is not analyzed, causing sensitive information exposure.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
